mapper.select: SELECT fv.id, fv.name, fv.unit, fv.fee_key_id as feeKeyId, fv.creator_type as creatorType, fv.creator_id as creatorId, fk.name as feeKeyName FROM apartment_fee_value afv LEFT JOIN fee_value fv ON afv.fee_value_id = fv.id AND fv.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN fee_key fk ON fv.fee_key_id = fk.id AND fk.is_deleted = 0 WHERE afv.apartment_id = #{apartmentId} AND afv.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY fv.id ASC
